title: Hadoop MapReduce Database Splitter Directory
description: The 'lib/db' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture contains classes for splitting database queries. Files like 'BigDecimalSplitter.java' and 'IntegerSplitter.java' convert query results into InputSplits. Each file implements a specific data type splitter, extending 'DBSplitter' interface. They collaborate with Hadoop's InputSplit and Oracle-specific classes for database-driven input formats, exemplifying the Data-Driven approach in Hadoop. This enables efficient parallel processing of large databases.

TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Database Splitter Directory

DESCRIPTION: The 'lib/db' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture contains classes for splitting database queries. Files like 'BigDecimalSplitter.java' and 'IntegerSplitter.java' convert query results into InputSplits. Each file implements a specific data type splitter, extending 'DBSplitter' interface. They collaborate with Hadoop's InputSplit and Oracle-specific classes for database-driven input formats, exemplifying the Data-Driven approach in Hadoop. This enables efficient parallel processing of large databases.
